hero.title: Technical Architect / Technical Leader
hero.tagline: Designing scalable systems, building reliable products.
hero.summary: As a dedicated Technical Architect with experience in building and optimizing software solutions, I am eager to bring my technical expertise and collaborative approach to a forward-thinking organization. My goal is to drive robust, scalable solutions that adapt to future industry trends.
hero.location: 502/13/2 Thong Nhat, Ward 16, Go Vap, HCM

about.headline: Over {{years}} years of experience in fullstack development, technical leadership, and system architecture.
about.description: From early e-commerce platforms to enterprise-scale microservices, I have consistently led technical teams to deliver high-performance applications. I specialize in backend architecture (Node.js, .NET Core), frontend/mobile development (React, React Native), and orchestrating complex deployments across diverse technology stacks.
focusAreas: System design for scalable and resilient platforms
Backend and integration architecture across .NET, Java, PHP, and Node.js
Frontend and mobile experience delivery with React, Vue, and React Native
Database optimization, caching, asynchronous processing, and cloud-native operations
